title: Beam Global Off-Grid Solar-Powered EV Charging Infrastructure
text: Beam Global is ramping up rollout of its off-grid solar-powered EV charging infrastructure with the EV ARC system. The EV ARC is a 100% renewable, transportable, off-grid EV charging option equipped with 4.3 kW of monocrystalline solar PV panels to provide energy for multi-standard EV chargers, each with an output of 5.76 kW. Optional battery storage of 20, 30, or 40 kWh is available. Deployment advantages include fast installation without electrical work or construction required, continued operation during blackouts or grid interruptions, and no utility bills. In New York City, it takes an average of two years for permitting and engineering to enable grid-connected chargers, whereas Beam deploys in the same parking space in under one hour. The EV ARC system is deployed across the United States with high-profile clients like the US Army and City of New York, with over 1,200 units installed, each supporting up to 6 chargers. Beam Global and HEVO recently launched a wireless charging platform enabling fully autonomous EV fleets with off-grid solar power and automated charging.
